# DEAD STRIKE

> Browser zombie FPS site for instant play, related shooter discovery, and category-led browsing across zombie, FPS, sniper, arena, and defense game routes.

## Core Pages

- [Dead Strike](https://dead-strike.com/): Main playable page for Dead Strike with browser access, controls, gameplay overview, and direct links to the full game tab.
- [Games Hub](https://dead-strike.com/games/): Landing page for the site's broader browser game catalog, organized around shooter and survival discovery.
- [404 Page](https://dead-strike.com/404.html): Fallback route that pushes users back into the live games directory and primary category hubs.

## Category Hubs

- [Zombie Games](https://dead-strike.com/games/zombie-games/): Category page collecting browser zombie games and adjacent undead survival titles.
- [FPS Games](https://dead-strike.com/games/fps-games/): Category page focused on first-person shooter browser games related to Dead Strike intent.
- [Shooter Games](https://dead-strike.com/games/shooter-games/): Collection page for browser shooter games covering arcade, tactical, sniper, and survival styles.

## Round-Two Tactical FPS

- [FPS Shooting Game: 3D Gun Game](https://dead-strike.com/fps-shooting-game-3d-gun-game/): Tactical browser FPS page centered on urban firefights and modern commando pacing.
- [Infantry Attack:Battle 3D FPS](https://dead-strike.com/infantry-attack-battle-3d-fps/): Browser FPS mission page built around frontline push pressure and military assault intent.
- [Duty Call Modern Warfate 2](https://dead-strike.com/duty-call-modern-warfate-2/): Modern-war browser FPS route focused on mission flow and special-ops pacing.
- [Command Strike FPS 2](https://dead-strike.com/command-strike-fps-2/): Fast tactical FPS page built around breach-and-clear tempo and short browser restarts.
- [COD Duty Call FPS](https://dead-strike.com/cod-duty-call-fps/): Browser military shooter page for players seeking direct firefights and loadout-driven gunplay.
- [Special Forces War Zombie Attack](https://dead-strike.com/special-forces-war-zombie-attack/): Hybrid zombie FPS page combining military combat language with undead pressure.

## Round-Two Multiplayer Arena

- [ShooterZ.io](https://dead-strike.com/shooterz-io/): Multiplayer arena shooter page for drop-in browser duels and open-map firefights.
- [Blocky Siege](https://dead-strike.com/blocky-siege/): Voxel arena shooter page centered on teamfights, peeking, and multiplayer pressure.
- [Moon Clash Heroes](https://dead-strike.com/moon-clash-heroes/): Hero-style browser shooter page built around sci-fi arena combat.
- [Nightwalkers.io](https://dead-strike.com/nightwalkers-io/): Dark multiplayer survival shooter page for haunted-street chaos and online firefights.
- [Combat Zombie Warfare](https://dead-strike.com/combat-zombie-warfare/): Multiplayer zombie combat page for squad-vs-undead browser matches.

## Round-Two Sniper

- [Sniper Mission War](https://dead-strike.com/sniper-mission-war/): Precision browser sniper page built around battlefield overwatch and mission-based marksmanship.
- [Sniper Ghost Shooter](https://dead-strike.com/sniper-ghost-shooter/): Stealth-leaning sniper page for shadowy maps and quiet takedowns.
- [Sniper Shot 3D](https://dead-strike.com/sniper-shot-3d/): Clean browser sniper route for rooftop sightlines and one-shot focus.
- [Urban Sniper Multiplayer](https://dead-strike.com/urban-sniper-multiplayer/): Multiplayer sniper page for urban overwatch and rooftop PvP.

## Round-Two Zombie Defense

- [Zombie defense: War Z Survival](https://dead-strike.com/zombie-defense-war-z-survival/): Zombie defense page focused on barricades, wave pressure, and hold-the-line survival.
- [Zombie Defense: Last Stand](https://dead-strike.com/zombie-defense-last-stand/): Last-stand zombie route built around fortify-until-dawn pressure.
- [Grand Zombie Swarm](https://dead-strike.com/grand-zombie-swarm/): Horde-control zombie defense page centered on crowd pressure and perimeter survival.
- [Zombie Vacation 2](https://dead-strike.com/zombie-vacation-2/): Zombie defense page set in an abandoned holiday zone with resort-siege pacing.
- [Zombie Shooter 3D](https://dead-strike.com/zombie-shooter-3d/): Fast browser zombie shooter page for direct run-and-gun sessions.
- [Zombie Survival Pixel Apocalypse](https://dead-strike.com/zombie-survival-pixel-apocalypse/): Pixel zombie action page for retro survival intent and quick browser sessions.
- [Pixel multiplayer survival zombie](https://dead-strike.com/pixel-multiplayer-survival-zombie/): Pixel multiplayer zombie page mixing survival pressure with browser co-op intent.

## Related Legacy Pages

- [Zombie Survival : Last Stand](https://dead-strike.com/zombie-survival-last-stand/): Browser zombie survival game page for users comparing Dead Strike with other undead shooters.
- [Challenge the Zombies](https://dead-strike.com/challenge-the-zombies/): Browser action page centered on zombie combat and wave-based pressure.
- [Survival Wave Zombie Multiplayer](https://dead-strike.com/survival-wave-zombie-multiplayer/): Multiplayer zombie survival page for players seeking cooperative or competitive alternatives.
- [MultiGun Arena Zombie Survival](https://dead-strike.com/multigun-arena-zombie-survival/): Browser zombie arena shooter page with similar survival and weapon-upgrade intent.
- [Noob vs Zombie](https://dead-strike.com/noob-vs-zombie/): Zombie-themed browser action page for lighter, casual comparisons inside the catalog.

## Key Facts

- Primary entity: Dead Strike, a browser-playable zombie FPS
- Core user intent: play online without download
- Main themes: zombie waves, first-person shooting, weapon unlocks, instant browser access, related shooter discovery
- Supporting navigation: zombie, FPS, and shooter hubs plus tactical FPS, sniper, multiplayer arena, and zombie-defense detail clusters
- Best canonical page for exact-match Dead Strike intent: https://dead-strike.com/
- Best page for broad catalog discovery: https://dead-strike.com/games/
- Canonical sitemap: https://dead-strike.com/sitemap.xml
- Website: https://dead-strike.com/
